title: Common Sense Plus
description: Collection of Items and blocks that were not added to the main mod
body:
The mod will add new food/tools and blocks, you can mine. Such as Ruby, a new Gem stronger than Diamond.

=⚠ Warning ⚠=

before downloading this mod, there will be bugs and errors! You can join my discord and report them there.

=Features=

1: There is a storage block called a mailbox that you can stick in front of your minecraft home. And use it with your friends, if you had one! And store items into it, so your friend can come pick it up. 2: The types of food you can make is Ramen, you make the broth then make the noodles to get a mixture of different types. 3: A 7 Up can that gives you quite the effects. (Mod has been discontinued by Dev as of 10/10/2025): Click "link" to find out why. [LINK](https://rtg321.weebly.com/gamer-does-a-blog/common-sense-discontinued-on-modrinth)
